column1: Ivan the Terrible's mother died five years after his father.
Ivan's younger brother wanted to become Tsar of All the Russians.
The fire at the Print Yard was an accident.
Ivan created a symbol of Russia that still exists today.
Ivan's wife died very early in their marriage.
When Ivan tried to quit as leader, many poorer people were pleased.
In his later years, Ivan felt that some people were against him.
The English were the first people to call him "Ivan the Terrible".
